topic: multiplying fractions and whole numbers by 2, doubling recipe quantities
latex:
Travis's favorite drink is a Strawberry Rhubarb Milkshake. He wants to make two batches. Fill in the following table for how much of each ingredient he will need.

\begin{tabular}{|c|c|c|}
\hline
\textbf{Batches} & 1 & 2 \\
\hline
rhubarb (cups) & $\frac{3}{2}$ & \\
\hline
sugar (cups) & $\frac{3}{4}$ & \\
\hline
orange zest (teaspoons) & $\frac{5}{4}$ & \\
\hline
milk (cups) & $\frac{5}{2}$ & \\
\hline
strawberry ice cream (pints) & $\frac{9}{4}$ & \\
\hline
\end{tabular}
answer_latex: rhubarb: $3$, sugar: $1\frac{1}{2}$, orange zest: $2\frac{1}{2}$, milk: $5$, strawberry ice cream: $4\frac{1}{2}$
